personas.name: Stability-Driven Tracker
personas.description: A long-term user who relies on the app for daily health monitoring but is losing trust due to critical system failures and crashes during active use.
goals: Maintain a continuous, uninterrupted data log for sleep and activity.
Rely on the app across multiple hardware generations without stability loss.
pain_points: System crashes that result in lost session data.
App freezing during high-CPU tasks like sleep tracking.
personas.context: Has used the app for over a year and recently upgraded hardware, yet still experiences legacy stability issues.
personas.constraints: Requires high reliability for health management; lacks the technical patience for manual data recovery.
personas.notes: Refined P1 to focus strictly on technical stability rather than general UI 'glitches'.

personas.name: Transparency-Focused Subscriber
personas.description: A user who is willing to pay for value but feels trapped by 'dark patterns' in subscription management and unclear billing cycles.
goals: Easily manage, pause, or cancel subscriptions without support intervention.
Receive clear, upfront notification of charges and refund policies.
pain_points: Intrusive paywalls that interrupt the core user flow.
Difficulty navigating the cancellation process within the app.
personas.context: Price-conscious and skeptical of 'free-to-play' models that hide core features behind a paywall.
personas.constraints: Financial sensitivity; limited time to spend on customer support disputes.
personas.notes: Merged P2 and P5 to address the unified frustration with monetization and billing transparency.

personas.name: Offline Relaxation Seeker
personas.description: A user who values the app for its meditation content but finds it unusable in low-connectivity environments.
goals: Access high-quality relaxation content while traveling or offline.
Customize audio environments with specific nature sounds and music.
pain_points: Inability to play downloaded content without an active data connection.
Limited granular control over session audio layers.
personas.context: Frequently uses the app in environments like airplanes or remote areas to manage stress.
personas.constraints: Limited data bandwidth; prefers a 'set it and forget it' offline experience.
personas.notes: Renamed P3 and added specific context regarding offline accessibility identified in the hybrid grouping.
